title: Uranodactylus patrinioides
taxonomy: Uranodactylus patrinioides is a genus of pterosaurs from the Late Jurassic period. The classification of Uranodactylus patrinioides is within the group Pterosauria, a subgroup of archosaurs. Further classification places it within the suborder Pterodactyloidea, which comprises advanced pterosaurs. Within the family, Uranodactylus patrinioides is classified as a member of the family Pterodactylidae. This classification suggests that Uranodactylus patrinioides is an extinct genus of flying reptiles.
